---
title: "Simulation Study — AR(1) with ARCH(1) Volatility"
author: "Akshaan Murugesu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)
```

```{r libraries}
library(parallel)
library(pracma)
ncores <- max(1, detectCores() - 1)
```

```{r source}
source(here::here("R", "01_core_estimators.R"))
source(here::here("R", "02_dgm.R"))
source(here::here("R", "03_drivers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "04_summary_tables.R"))
```

## Simulation design

AR(1)–ARCH(1) model: X_t = phi * X_{t-1} + sigma_t * z_t,
sigma_t^2 = alpha0 + alpha1 * X_{t-1}^2, with (alpha0, alpha1) = (0.5, 0.4).

```{r params}
set.seed(2025)

nsim        <- 1000
phi_true    <- 0.4
alpha0      <- 0.5
alpha1      <- 0.4
n_values    <- c(50, 75, 100, 200, 300)
alpha_grid  <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.05)
innovations <- c("gaussian", "t5", "chisq5", "exp1")
rds_file    <- here::here("outputs", "results_arch1.rds")
```

```{r run-or-load}
if (file.exists(rds_file)) {
  results_arch1 <- readRDS(rds_file)
  message("Loaded cached results from ", rds_file)
} else {
  results_arch1 <- setNames(vector("list", length(innovations)), innovations)
  for (innov in innovations) {
    results_arch1[[innov]] <- list()
    for (n in n_values) {
      cat("AR(1)-ARCH(1) |", innov, "| n =", n, "\n")
      results_arch1[[innov]][[as.character(n)]] <- run_hybrid_grid_arch(
        n = n, nsim = nsim, phi_true = phi_true,
        alpha_grid = alpha_grid, innov = innov,
        alpha0 = alpha0, alpha1 = alpha1, ncores = ncores
      )
    }
  }
  saveRDS(results_arch1, rds_file)
  message("Results saved to ", rds_file)
}
```

## Plotting helpers

```{r helpers}
pretty_innov_expr <- function(innov) {
  switch(innov,
    gaussian = quote(N(0,1)), t5 = quote(t[5]),
    chisq5   = quote(chi^2[5]), exp1 = quote(Exp(1)), as.name(innov))
}
add_headroom <- function(ylim, pct = 0.05) {
  ylim[2] <- ylim[2] + pct * diff(ylim); ylim
}
```

## Plots

```{r plots}
for (innov in names(results_arch1)) {
  innov_lab <- pretty_innov_expr(innov)
  for (n in n_values) {
    res        <- results_arch1[[innov]][[as.character(n)]]
    hybrid_mat <- res$hybrid
    whittle    <- res$whittle
    fdel       <- res$fdel

    rmse_alpha <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, rmse, true = phi_true)
    interior   <- alpha_grid > 0 & alpha_grid < 1
    idx_best   <- which(interior)[which.min(rmse_alpha[interior])]
    alpha_best <- alpha_grid[idx_best]
    hyb_best   <- hybrid_mat[, idx_best]

    ## ---- RMSE curve --------------------------------------------------------
    plot(alpha_grid, rmse_alpha, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
         xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = "RMSE",
         ylim = add_headroom(range(rmse_alpha, na.rm = TRUE)),
         main = bquote("RMSE vs" ~ alpha ~ "| AR(1)–ARCH(1)" * "\n" *
                       T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
    grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
    points(0, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 0], pch = 19, col = "darkgreen")
    points(1, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 1], pch = 19, col = "purple")
    text(0, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 0], "FDEL",    pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
    text(1, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 1], "Whittle", pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
    abline(v = alpha_best, col = "red", lty = 2)
    text(alpha_best, min(rmse_alpha, na.rm = TRUE),
         bquote(alpha["best"] == .(alpha_best)), pos = 4, cex = 0.7)

    ## ---- Boxplots ----------------------------------------------------------
    lab_expr <- eval(bquote(expression(
      Whittle, FDEL, Hybrid ~ alpha == .(round(alpha_best, 2)))))
    boxplot(list(Whittle = whittle, FDEL = fdel, Hybrid = hyb_best),
            main = bquote("AR(1)–ARCH(1), T =" ~ .(n) ~
                          ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
            ylab = expression(hat(phi)),
            col  = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue"),
            names = rep("", 3), xaxt = "n")
    abline(h = phi_true, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
    axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = lab_expr, tick = FALSE)
  }
}
```

## Summary tables

```{r table}
big_table_arch1 <- make_big_table_arch1(results_arch1, phi_true = phi_true)
print(big_table_arch1)
```

```{r latex, results='asis'}
to_latex_table_arch1(
  big_table_arch1,
  caption = paste0("Bias, SD and RMSE of Whittle, FDEL and Hybrid estimators for",
                   " AR(1)--ARCH(1) with $\\phi_0=0.4$, $(\\alpha_0,\\alpha_1)=(0.5,0.4)$",
                   " under different innovations.")
)
```
